title: [Deprecated] Gatwick Express Class 377 / 387 Pack
description:
Deprecated
Class 377/387 units in Gatwick Express liveries, for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![GX Red Class 387 Livery (GTR)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5772d228d3e8550b667edef29c98af21db42a14.png)

# **This Resource Pack is now deprecated, please use the [GTR Class 387 Megapack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gtr-class-387-megapack) instead!**





Gatwick Express Class 377/387 Pack

This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway, adding liveries to the Class 377 fleet!

Featuring:
Class 377 Gatwick Express (GTR) - The tomato-all-over livery applied to the GX Class 387/2 sets from new, part of the Govia Thameslink Railway family of operators.

Class 377 Gatwick Express (White) - The livery carried by 387105 when borrowed by GX from the Great Northern 387 pool.

Class 377 Gatwick Express (National Express [Old]) - The livery applied to Class 460 units when they operated GX services, applied to the 377
